section_miscategorizations.text: He is currently taking 1 mg of testosterone every 10 days, and finasteride. He also takes cialis daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Current medication list is typically documented as part of objective data rather than the narrative symptom history, though including it in HPI is common and not misleading.
Prescription format preference is an implementation detail of treatment and fits better in the plan, but its placement in HPI does not substantially distort clinical meaning.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor will get the prescriptions.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The statement is vague and more of a process note than a specific clinical plan (e.g., which medications, doses, or changes), but it is still broadly within the plan domain.
